parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { parent: { database_id: $json.memory_db_id }, properties: { Name: { title: [{ text: { content: $json.subject } }] }, memory_key: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: $json.memory_key } }] }, type: { select: { name: $json.type } }, summary: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: $json.summary } }] }, confidence: { number: Number($json.confidence) }, last_seen: { date: { start: $json.last_seen } }, stale_after_days: { number: Number($json.stale_after_days) }, status: { select: { name: 'active' } }, source: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: $json.source } }] }, tags: { multi_select: ($json.tags || []).map((t) => ({ name: String(t).slice(0, 100) })) } } } }}
